## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Link to an issue, or explain the motivation if there is no issue.

## How

Implementation notes only if the approach is non-obvious.

## Test plan

- [ ] `lein test`
- [ ] GPU / OpenCL paths exercised (if you touched distances or kernels): describe hardware and what you ran
- [ ] `clj-kondo` shows no new relevant warnings

## Checklist

- [ ] User-facing change documented in `CHANGELOG.md` (if applicable)
- [ ] Public API / behavior change called out in the PR description for reviewers
